conservative.name: Dream Weaver
conservative.requirements: 5 favour. As part of invoking this blessing, you fall asleep and remain so for at least 6 hours. You must have a connection to the target, such as a portrait, true name, or personal item

success.description: You enter into the dreaming mind of a mortal creature anywhere in the world. While in that mortal's dream, you may interact with him almost as if speaking face-to-face, although the entire experience is more surreal and less literal. You may use applicable social skills such as Charm or Guile to ask questions or influence the dreamer

boon.description: You gain to checks to influence the dreamer

chaosStar.description: You recover no fatigue, stress, or wounds for sleeping overnight
